maay_maay.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Dhacdo weyn ma jirto. Fieldwork caadi ah, horumar joogto ah.
maay_maay.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Watershed-ku wuu bogsanaya dhinac walba. Headwaters way qaboobyihiin oo nadiif yihiin. Mainstem-ku mar kale kalluun buu sido. Beaver wetlands ayaa qabanaya shaqada floodplain. Sidaas ayaa watershed-scale recovery u eg tahay marka timing iyo community isku yimaadaan.
maay_maay.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Components-ka badankood way soo hagaagyihiin. Dhawr weli shaqo bay u baahanyihiin. Jihada way fiican tahay oo community-gu wuu ka qeybqaadanaya.
maay_maay.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Guulo qaar, farqi qaar. Watershed work runta ah marar dhif ah bay isku mid noqotaa; qaybo baa soo hagaagay halka kuwo kale istaageen.
maay_maay.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Quality celceliska hooseeya oo components yar baa gaadhay recovery thresholds. Sidaas ayaa watersheds si aamusnaan ah u xumaadaan marka stewardship-ku ku gaari waayo pressures-ka.
maay_maay.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Initial conditions way shaqeynaya u eg yihiin. Isticmaal Year 1 citizen-science monitoring iyo waxbarasho si aad u dhisto community support intaadan ku bixin ficillo laysku hayo sida dam removal.
maay_maay.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Waxa aad component-kan u qaban karto
maay_maay.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Chart-ka quality trend sano-ba-sano ee watershed component
maay_maay.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ AI watershed educator-ku wuu akhrinaya watershed data-gaaga...
maay_maay.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Ma aha qof Wabanaki ah, ma aha watershed coordinator ama hydrologist dhab ah, umana hadlo Wabanaki nation, agency, ama organization kasta.
maay_maay.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Codadka la aamini karo ee Maine watershed work, la tasho Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, iyo Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
maay_maay.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Watershed components lix, sano toban, Maine pressures dhab ah: dam barriers, agricultural runoff, suburban stormwater, floods iyo droughts oo climate keeno.
maay_maay.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Hydrological feedback rules ayaa isku xidha.
maay_maay.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Buffers caafimaad qaba ayaa qaboojiya headwater streams. Beaver wetlands ayaa yareeya floods oo nadiifiya mainstem. Ag runoff yar ayaa webiga u oggolaanaya inuu neefsado. Webiyada isku xidhan oo hoos leh ayaa soo celiya salmon iyo alewife runs.
maay_maay.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Haddii aadan waxba qaban sano 10 miyaa?
maay_maay.replay_same_conditions: 🔁 Ku celi conditions isku mid ah
maay_maay.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Weydii AI watershed educator inuu akhriyo watershed data-gaaga
maay_maay.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: AI watershed-science educator ayaa akhrinaya xaaladaada hadda
maay_maay.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Weli ficillo ma jiraan sanadkan. Dooro component, dooro technique.
maay_maay.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Condensation kuma filna — aad u kulul ama aad u qallalan.
maay_maay.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Condensation gaabis ah. Precipitation joogto ah laakiin jilicsan.
maay_maay.strong_condensation_typical_rainfall: Condensation xoog leh. Roob caadi ah.
maay_maay.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Moisture sare + temp qabow + lift xoog leh → convective precipitation culus.
maay_maay.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Hagaaji cloud moisture, temperature, iyo dabaysha. Widget-ku wuxuu kala saaraa precipitation afar types oo kala duwan. Score ma jiro, reveal ma jiro — kor iyo hoos u dhaqaaji oo fiiri.
maay_maay.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Hypothesis (free text): Maxaa keeni kara storm marka la barbardhigo drizzle?
maay_maay.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Hay laba slider oo deggan. Dhaqaaji mid. Fiiri.
maay_maay.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Hel laba settings oo dhaliya type isku mid ah.
maay_maay.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Storms dhab ahi waxay u baahanyihiin moisture iyo instability labadaba. Baadh.
maay_maay.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Sharax sida moisture, temperature, iyo dabayshu si wadajir ah u go'aamiyaan precipitation type.
maay_maay.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Design note: discrete 4-type precipitation marker; rainfall-rate score ma jiro; reveal ma jiro — by design.
maay_maay.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Water Cycle. Keyboard shortcuts: 1 ilaa 6 dooro stage, J wuxuu rogaa Journey mode, R U P dooro journey path-kaaga.
maay_maay.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: U beddel Watershed Steward campaign sano 10
maay_maay.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: raac droplet keliya oo badda ka bilow oo badda ku noqo. Waxaad ka bilowaysaa badda, evaporate, u guuraysaa cloud, u dhacaysaa roob, ka dibna dooro path dhulka (river runoff, underground infiltration, ama geed nuugo). Path kastaa waqti kala duwan buu qaataa. Dhammaystir loop-ka si aad u log-gareyso journey; 3 loops ayaa fura Journey badge.
maay_maay.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Waxaad raacday water molecule ISKU MID ah dhammaan wareega — waxay beddeshay form (liquid → vapor → liquid) laakiin marnaba lama abuurin lamana baabi'in. Droplet kasta oo aad cabto ayaa cycle-gareynayay balaayiin sano.
maay_maay.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Noqo water droplet oo ku dhex socdaal water cycle-ga oo dhan! Sameey doorasho stage kasta oo baro science-ka ku dambeeya transformation kasta.
maay_maay.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Weydii su'aal (tusaale, Maxay clouds u sabbeeyaan?)...
maay_maay.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Biyaha waa la ilaaliyaa — runoff + waxa nuugma ≈ 100% roobka gaadha dhulka. Waxba ma luntaan; kaliya waxay qaataan paths kala duwan oo badda ku noqda.
